item.title: Have some people making music

item.title: FRIDAY unhinged MEME dump of pure chaos #257 (Hang in there, the weekend is almost here)
item.description:
1. This is how you surprise your girlfriend!
2. New Jurassic Park looks good
3
4. Sir PRISE
5. That's actually HIGH PRAISE in the language of men
6. Dope play, also I have no idea what's going on here and what sport is this
7. Relationship goals!
8. RAP DOG
9. How the hell do you discover that you are good at this? :D
10. Friends: Come out with us, just act normal okay? ME:
12. Genius or Dumb?
13. Dude's really asking for it
14. Ending the dump with another fabulous look
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Damn, that's right up there with Big Bird singing "It ain't easy being green" at Jim Henson's funeral.

item.title: Smol dump of legally stolen memes and things
item.description:
Has anyone made her do a Captcha just to be sure?
I'll see you in heck.
Tale as old as time.
Seriously not high maintenance
I'm supposed to get tested, but I keep getting distracted. Found this relatable.
And they hired me.
We're a tramp stamp.
Give it a month, at least.
Serious note.
It makes me laugh everytime.
I wish I didn't understand it now
In the dark.
Moo fucker.
No one annoys me like me.
Must be #1
So that ADHD testing...
I'm going with the fires
And it does.
Cooper Tax
item.dc:creator: WorthlessRaisin

item.title: Remember when commercials had character and gumption¿
item.description: Sega remembers.... apparently. Hello friends on the FP I've made a twitter. https://x.com/LedsenPotatis?t=87s9iBZryH2uGKnSq917Fg&s=09 Also, here's my current Playlist. Please send me suggestions, I'd love to know what everyone's listening to while they work. https://music.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL_fEJ_1mJjA6-gFRI0uQuErj39t1CQBjD&si=HN_oGHnOJkB3k9lN
item.dc:creator: LedsenPotatis

item.title: Rhona Mitra as Lara Croft (Wayback in 1997)
item.description: Rhona jumpstarted her career when in '97 she started appearing as the very first live-action model for "Lara Croft"; in various promos (around the time that Tomb Raider 2 was set to release).
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: Phil is a spicy young lad
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
that's way nicer than any tv i had growing up
i have questions
i'm a fan of her work
don't go chasing these moments though
that's crazy
i can hear that painting
i guess
the worst
good riddance
mmm hmm
as is tradition
gotta be one of the best flavors
what have i done?
two steps ahead of you
red seems the obvious choice
holler at your boy
that's my time... have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: I don't have a single problem that money couldn't solve.
item.dc:creator: Thanlarkis

item.title: I will always love this video
item.dc:creator: justasimpleinternetfarmer

item.title: Friday Dump
item.description:
These were so good
Don't forget the size has gotten smaller, too
Also as a short person I have gotten things off bottom shelves for tall people. It feels good to give back
Some of the best food you'll have, too
I'm the trash panda
We have a lot of pine trees on our property, too
She was so much more gorgeous before
Oooh pretty
I just wanna smell it
I cut my own hair and it basically looks like this now
We love our wild bunnies
This was me with my trash bill this month, it's due quarterly and messes me up
This sentence did NOT end how I expected
This is Ouija, she's finally warming up to me. She's got a classic tortie tude
August knows that the giant bean bag is for him not the kids
We like to say he has Sith eyes
My sweet elderly baby Jack
item.dc:creator: Painahimah

item.title: Some times hoomans need to give headbumps of assurance...
item.description: Edit: thanks for the accolades ! Sauce: unknown, tried but couldn't find Also its about the wholesome moment, its not about the piano music in the background. Exhale calmly, youll be fine.
item.dc:creator: wheyandcoffee
